$comment: M_V6.MYTH.EVENTS — 5 rare events with a shared >5min cooldown between any two firings. At most one active at a time. Each event's `kind` drives the runtime effect dispatch; the `displayName` + `flavorText` show in the HUD banner. Adding a 6th event = one entry here + one switch arm in the dispatcher.

solar-eclipse.flavorText: The sun darkens. Every faction's vision range halves for 60 seconds.

meteor-strike.flavorText: A meteor crashes! A random tile burns + everything on it takes 30 damage.

wildlife-migration.flavorText: A neutral herd crosses the map. Clear it for +20 food.

oracle-vision.flavorText: A random faction glimpses another faction's base — a single-tile reveal.

harvest-festival.flavorText: Every faction gains +50 food + +20 gold from the festival markets.
